assertions.expectation: Addresses Istio control plane version compatibility with the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response explicitly discusses Istio version compatibility with Kubernetes 1.32, includes checking compatibility matrix, and warns about potential incompatibility issues

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility matrix before upgrading GKE
assertions.reason: Response includes specific command to check Istio compatibility and states 'Verify Istio 1.x supports Kubernetes 1.32' with explicit reference to checking release notes for compatibility matrix

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading Istio first if the current Istio version doesn't support the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response includes critical checkpoint stating 'If not, you'll need to upgrade Istio first (separate operation)' and mentions Istio canary upgrade pattern as alternative approach

assertions.expectation: Explains that sidecar injection happens via mutating webhook and may cause issues during node drain/recreation
assertions.reason: Response addresses webhook functionality with testing commands and troubleshooting for sidecar injection breaking, including checking mutating webhook health

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected — verify the sidecar version matches
assertions.reason: While the response mentions testing sidecar injection and includes post-upgrade validation, it doesn't specifically address verifying sidecar version matching for new pods on upgraded nodes

assertions.expectation: Recommends monitoring Istio proxy version consistency across the mesh after upgrade
assertions.reason: Response doesn't specifically recommend monitoring proxy version consistency across the mesh, though it includes some proxy configuration checking commands

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check Istio version and proxy sync status (istioctl or kubectl)
assertions.reason: Response includes multiple istioctl and kubectl commands including checking Istio version, proxy configuration, and istioctl analyze commands

assertions.expectation: Warns about potential traffic disruption if Istio control plane and sidecar versions are mismatched
assertions.reason: While response mentions mTLS failures and general mesh functionality issues, it doesn't specifically warn about traffic disruption from control plane and sidecar version mismatches
